STATUS: 403
HEADER: Server: nginx
HEADER: Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8
EXPECT: forbidden
NOTE: Legit auth-fail 403 from Seznam (no anti-bot signature). Distinct from Cloudflare 403 — `Server: nginx` not `cloudflare`. Classified as plain forbidden so KT-A7 escalates rather than triggering Cloudflare bypass.
---
<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>403 Forbidden</title></head><body><h1>403 Forbidden</h1><p>Přístup k požadovanému zdroji byl odepřen.</p></body></html>
